subject: Re: AreTomo and Dark Images in WARP
body:
Hi Katie,
I’ve not looked closely enough at how DarkTol is used to know off the top of my head, sorry about that! 
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Mar 12, 2025, at 05:52, Katie Downes <katiegdownes@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi Alister, 
What is the relationship between --min_intensity in WARP and -DarkTol in AreTomo? DarkTol of 0.7 works well for my data and I want to include this in my WARP pipeline. 
Many thanks in advance, 
Dr Katie Downes
